name: Thanksgiving Cake
description: Vanilla sponge cake base, white and blue vanilla buttercream, edible wafer paper print with food-grade ink, and hand-piped frosting roses.

name: Birthday Cake
description: Vanilla or chocolate sponge base, white and blue sugar fondant covering, plastic toy car toppers, cardstock signage, and a wax hippo candle.

name: Mother's Day Cake
description: Square sponge cake, whipped white buttercream frosting, multi-colored food gel tints for piped roses, and a single decorative red rose topper.

name: Pampas Cake
description: Round sponge cake, watercolor-style charcoal and white buttercream, real dried pampas grass, chocolate spheres coated in gold luster dust, and an acrylic topper.

name: Silhouette Cake
description: Round sponge cake, cream and purple tinted buttercream, cardstock silhouette topper, gold-painted chocolate balls, and a handcrafted gum paste flower.

name: Graduation Cake
description: White round sponge cake, vanilla buttercream, black sugar fondant ribbon, gold metallic sugar pearls, and handcrafted fondant graduation cap and diploma.

name: Christmas Cake
description: Round sponge cake, green-tinted leaf buttercream, red frosting script, sugar paste flowers, and a non-edible fabric ribbon bow.

name: Graduation Cake
description: Two-tier sponge cake, royal blue and white buttercream, edible starch-based photo print, handcrafted fondant stethoscope and cap, and gold chocolate spheres.

name: Birthday Cake
description: Ruffled white buttercream sponge cake, handcrafted fondant fruit shapes (strawberry, banana, pear), and edible fruit-themed sugar decals.

name: Kenya Power Cake
description: Large square sponge cake, yellow buttercream frosting, edible logo sheet print, blue fabric ribbon border, and gold metallic sugar dragees.
